name: Northern Scorpling
description: An aggressive Grounded 2 scorpling that rushes and pressures with short violent attacks.
behavior: It moves in short bursts and attacks quickly when it spots the player.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks as soon as it sees the player and keeps pressure with quick combos.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually fights almost any nearby creature.
strategy: Keep your distance after its rushes and punish it when its claw chain ends.

abilities.name: Claw Slash
abilities.description: It lashes out with a quick short claw strike to stop you from regaining tempo.
